languages.text: "Толковый план, на месте голова у паренька. Сразу видно, не комиссарские речи".

traits.locale_text: "Толковый план, на месте голова у паренька. Сразу видно, не комиссарские речи".

languages.text: "Solid plan, the kid's got a good head on his shoulders. Tells it straight and no Commissar words."
languages.original_text: "Толковый план, на месте голова у паренька. Сразу видно, не комиссарские речи".

traits.locale_text: "Solid plan, the kid's got a good head on his shoulders. Tells it straight and no Commissar words."
"Solid plan, the kid's got a good head on his shoulders. Tells it straight and no Commissar words."

languages.text: "Sağlam plan, iyi çalışan bir kafa görüyorum. Diyeceğini dümdüz söylüyor ve Komiser lafları sarf etmiyor."
languages.original_text: "Solid plan, the kid's got a good head on his shoulders. Tells it straight and no Commissar words."

traits.locale_text: "Sağlam plan, iyi çalışan bir kafa görüyorum. Diyeceğini dümdüz söylüyor ve Komiser lafları sarf etmiyor."

languages.text: « C'est un plan qui tient la route. Ce jeunot en a dans le cerveau. Il dit ce qu'il pense, sans paroles de commissaire. »
languages.original_text: "Solid plan, the kid's got a good head on his shoulders. Tells it straight and no Commissar words."

traits.locale_text: « C'est un plan qui tient la route. Ce jeunot en a dans le cerveau. Il dit ce qu'il pense, sans paroles de commissaire. »

languages.text: «Es un buen plan: el chaval tiene buena cabeza. Habla claro, sin palabras de Comisario».
languages.original_text: "Solid plan, the kid's got a good head on his shoulders. Tells it straight and no Commissar words."

traits.locale_text: «Es un buen plan: el chaval tiene buena cabeza. Habla claro, sin palabras de Comisario».

languages.text: “很可靠的计划，这小子脑子好使。说话直截了当，没有政委那套官腔。”
languages.original_text: "Solid plan, the kid's got a good head on his shoulders. Tells it straight and no Commissar words."

traits.locale_text: “很可靠的计划，这小子脑子好使。说话直截了当，没有政委那套官腔。”

languages.text: "Guter Plan, da hat jemand Grips im Kopf. Schießt los, und kein Kommissarsgefasel."
languages.original_text: "Solid plan, the kid's got a good head on his shoulders. Tells it straight and no Commissar words."

traits.locale_text: "Guter Plan, da hat jemand Grips im Kopf. Schießt los, und kein Kommissarsgefasel."
